explanation: The diagram shows multiple external clients/frontends communicating directly with individual backend services: Customer Management Frontend -> Customer Management Backend, Customer Self-Service Frontend -> Customer Management Backend / Customer Self-Service Backend / Policy Management Backend, Policy Management Frontend -> Policy Management Backend, and Risk Management Client -> Risk Management Server. There is no single unified entry point or gateway component mediating access to internal services, so internal service topology is exposed and cross-cutting concerns would need to be handled separately across services.
